theory.canonical_statement: The electrohydrodynamic resonance operator introduces a time-varying charge density into the vortex core and promotes the resulting force modulation to a driven acceleration law. The point of the entry is to turn the previous static concentration effect into a tunable oscillatory operator.
theory.technical_interpretation: Apply a fluctuating negative charge density $\rho$\_e(t) = $\rho$\_0 + $\rho$\_1\,cos($\omega$\,t) to a vortex region. The total radial acceleration becomes

equation_progression.interpretive_role: This introduces an explicit periodic forcing channel into the vortex region.
This converts the electrical drive into a modulated inward pull.
This closes the progression by expressing the whole forcing law as an operator on the evolving state.

derivation_layer.source_latex:
% BEGIN TZP DERIVATION LAYER
\tzpsection{Derivation Layer}
\paragraph{Primary Equation.}
\[
\rho_e(t) = \rho_0 + \rho_1\cos(\omega t)
\]
\[
a_r^{\mathrm{tot}}(t) = a_r^{\mathrm{fluid}} + \kappa\rho_e(t)
\]
\[
\mathcal{R}_{\mathrm{EHD}}[\Psi] = a_r^{\mathrm{tot}}(t)\,\Psi
\]

\paragraph{Primary Derivation.}
The identity \( \rho_e(t) = \rho_0 + \rho_1\cos(\omega t) \) is an operator relation. Applying the operator to the relevant function and using its algebraic properties (such as linearity, commutators, or derivative rules) leads to the displayed equality.
\paragraph{Equation Type.}
This statement is classified as a operator relation.

\paragraph{Interpretation.}
This relation applies to the quantities defined above. In the TRAWIN reading, the equation functions as the operator-level carrier for the entry’s information content. Within the CHL view, the derivation provides an explicit term connecting the canonical proposition to its proof certificate.
% END TZP DERIVATION LAYER

dictionary_sections.definition: An electrohydrodynamic resonance operator begins with charge density that changes periodically in time. The canonical relation separates a steady electrical background from an oscillating driving contribution.
dictionary_sections.contextual_meaning: The entry changes a static density condition into a tunable forcing law. The baseline \(\rho_0\) supplies the persistent level, while \(\rho_1\cos(\omega t)\) gives its cyclic departure; a coupled response can therefore inherit periodic modulation.
dictionary_sections.derivable_consequences: Density ranges from \(\rho_0-\rho_1\) to \(\rho_0+\rho_1\). If \(\rho_1=0\), the relation becomes static; increasing \(\omega\) repeats the same modulation more rapidly.
dictionary_sections.lemma_support: The approved aligned source states this relation and identifies \(\rho_e(t)\), \(\rho_0\), \(\rho_1\), \(\omega\), and \(t\). Later coupling remains a separate claim.
dictionary_sections.technical_interpretation: This harmonic modulation law supplies an operator input whose offset, amplitude, and frequency may be independently varied in calculation. Because the cosine drive is explicit, the subsequent operator can distinguish baseline response from oscillatory response without redefining the charge-density source.
dictionary_sections.equation_grounding: \(\rho_e(t)\) is time-dependent electric charge density; \(\rho_0\) is the baseline charge-density component; \(\rho_1\) is the oscillating amplitude; \(\omega\) is angular driving frequency; and \(t\) is time.
dictionary_sections.interpretive_role: This entry turns a static density mechanism into a timed forcing signal carried into later driven-acceleration relations.

tzp_thesaurus.meaning: The time-independent offset around which the electrical density oscillates.
The cosine variation that gives the forcing term a repeatable temporal rhythm.
The rate parameter that controls the cycle of the modulation.

publication_overrides.equation_support_summary: The periodic charge-density input turns the static baseline into a timed forcing term for the downstream acceleration and resonance relations.

approved_source_enrichment.method: formula-normalized raw export alignment followed by manual review
approved_source_enrichment.limitation: The aligned passage validates the oscillating charge-density drive; the claimed magnitude of parametric amplification remains model-conditional and is not promoted by this approval.

proof_pipeline.status: source-truth provenance linked to generated proof-obligation and certificate artifacts
proof_pipeline.scope_note: This metadata records authorship, lineage, and proof-pipeline artifact links. It does not by itself assert that the entry has a completed native analytic proof.

verification_summary.wolfram_spine_checks: passed for generated curated/Zenodo spine checks; energy-matter naive integral divergence warning is expected
